queries.question: For each homeowners association, provide the corresponding descriptions of rules.
queries.sql: select homeowners_associations.name , rules.description from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?homeowners_association_rules a :Homeowners_association_rules .
  ?rules a :Rules .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasRules ?rules .
  ?homeowners_associations a :Homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasHomeowners_associations ?homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_associations p:name ?name .
  ?rules p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each homeowners association, show the rules they have.
queries.sql: select homeowners_associations.name , rules.rulename from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?rulename WHERE {
  ?homeowners_association_rules a :Homeowners_association_rules .
  ?rules a :Rules .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasRules ?rules .
  ?homeowners_associations a :Homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasHomeowners_associations ?homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_associations p:name ?name .
  ?rules p:rulename ?rulename .
}

queries.question: What descriptions are associated with each homeowners association?
queries.sql: SELECT Rules.description  from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id   GROUP BY Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Homeowners_association_rules.associd) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Homeowners_associations)

queries.question: Give me the rule name and description that is in common for all homeowners associations.
queries.sql: SELECT Rules.rulename, Rules.description  from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id   GROUP BY Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Homeowners_association_rules.associd) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Homeowners_associations)

queries.question: Show me the rule name and description corresponding to each homeowners association respectively.
queries.sql: select homeowners_associations.name , rules.rulename , rules.description from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?rulename ?description WHERE {
  ?homeowners_association_rules a :Homeowners_association_rules .
  ?rules a :Rules .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasRules ?rules .
  ?homeowners_associations a :Homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_association_rules p:hasHomeowners_associations ?homeowners_associations .
  ?homeowners_associations p:name ?name .
  ?rules p:rulename ?rulename .
  ?rules p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the rules that each homeowners association has.
queries.sql: SELECT Rules.rulename  from Homeowners_association_rules join Rules on Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid = Rules.ruleid join Homeowners_associations on Homeowners_association_rules.associd = Homeowners_associations.id   GROUP BY Homeowners_association_rules.ruleid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Homeowners_association_rules.associd) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Homeowners_associations)

Show me the rules that each homeowners association has.
